rules: Use 'Brand Navy' for primary buttons and active navigation items.
Use 'Brand Turquoise' sparingly for 'Call to Action' highlights or progress indicators.
Backgrounds should be mostly 'Background Default' (#F8FAFC) to reduce eye strain.
Cards should be 'Background Paper' (#FFFFFF) with a subtle shadow.
NEVER use gradients for text. Keep text high-contrast solid colors.

rtl_strategy.margins: Use logical properties: ms-* (margin-start), me-* (margin-end) instead of ml/mr.
rtl_strategy.paddings: Use logical properties: ps-* (padding-start), pe-* (padding-end) instead of pl/pr.
rtl_strategy.alignment: text-right by default. Use text-start/text-end for explicit alignment.

cards.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#1C3D74] hover:bg-[#152d57] text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all

inputs.style: flex h-11 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#46C1BE] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70 mb-2 block text-slate-700

tabs.list: inline-flex h-12 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-slate-100 p-1 text-slate-500
tabs.trigger: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-white transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#1C3D74] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm

readiness_card.description: A prominent card showing the school's data completion status.
readiness_card.style: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1C3D74] to-[#2a5096] text-white rounded-2xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden

header.title: إعدادات المدرسة
header.subtitle: قم بإدارة بيانات المدرسة، الفصول، والمعلمين لتجهيز الجدول المدرسي.

visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'lucide-react' icons. Stroke width: 1.5px or 2px. Size: 18px or 20px.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'border-slate-200' for subtle separation. Avoid heavy borders.
visual_enhancers.radius: Use 'rounded-xl' for containers, 'rounded-lg' for inner elements.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio is at least 4.5:1.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Implement the 'School Settings' page as a main layout with a sidebar or top tabs.
2. Use the 'Readiness Status' card as the hero element on the 'Overview' tab.
3. For the 'Teachers' and 'Classes' tabs, use a clean Data Table with search and filter options.
4. Ensure all text is Arabic and direction is RTL.
5. Use 'react-hook-form' and 'zod' for all data entry forms.
6. Mock data should be realistic Saudi school data (e.g., 'المرحلة الثانوية', 'مسار علوم الحاسب', 'أ. محمد الغامدي').
7. Do NOT use 'lorem ipsum'. Use meaningful Arabic placeholder text.
8. Keep the design spacious. Avoid clutter.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
